text.title: BA Week-One Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes the BA from pack-state signal to the active rule.

decision-tree.root-question: inventory.md row_count >= 5 OR project < 6 months old?

conclusion.verdict: STOP; escalate access; run artefact pull
identify Approve-authority stakeholder; do not advance

branch.when: inventory_complete == true AND approve_authority_count >= 1 AND term_count < 15

conclusion.verdict: harvest more terms from inventory + interviews

branch.when: inventory_complete == true AND approve_authority_count >= 1 AND term_count >= 15 AND diagram_files.length == 0

conclusion.verdict: commit at least one baseline diagram before Day 5

branch.when: inventory_complete == true AND approve_authority_count >= 1 AND term_count >= 15 AND diagram_files.length >= 1 AND signoff_empty == true
inventory_complete == true AND approve_authority_count >= 1 AND term_count >= 15 AND diagram_files.length >= 1 AND signoff_empty == false

conclusion.verdict: pack accepted; ready to start requirements
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: inventory=47 → approve_authority=2 → glossary=22 → 1 diagram → PM signoff at 2026-05-22T17:00Z → pack accepted (r5).
